# ReplayChess

> ReplayChess is an interactive chess platform where players replay iconic positions from chess history, compete in real-time multiplayer, and analyze their moves against legendary grandmasters. Built with Next.js 15, React 19, Socket.IO, and Stockfish WASM.

ReplayChess lets you step into the shoes of chess legends like Bobby Fischer, Garry Kasparov, and Magnus Carlsen. Pick a legend, choose a historical position, and play it out — then see how your moves compare to theirs with move-by-move analysis. You can also challenge friends via private invite links, queue for ELO-based matchmaking, play against Stockfish AI at four difficulty levels, or compete in tournaments.

The platform features 50+ chess legends organized by era (Romantic, Classical, Hypermodern, Soviet, Modern, Contemporary), 3,600+ ECO-coded openings, post-game analysis with divergence detection, and a practice mode to replay positions against Stockfish Expert (~2200 ELO). All games run in real-time over WebSockets with distinct audio cues for moves, captures, checks, castling, and time warnings.

## Game Modes

- [Quick Match](https://playchess.tech/play): ELO-based matchmaking with time controls, pairs you with a similarly-rated opponent
- [Challenge Friend](https://playchess.tech/play): Generate a private invite link and play anyone — no account required for the invitee to view
- [Play the Machine](https://playchess.tech/play): Four Stockfish difficulty levels (Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert)
- [Play as Legend](https://playchess.tech/play): Start from a historical position and replay a grandmaster's game
- [Play Opening](https://playchess.tech/play): Begin from any of 3,600+ ECO-coded openings

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://playchess.tech/): Hero, how-to-play guide, and feature overview
- [Legends](https://playchess.tech/legends): Hall of Fame — 50+ chess legends grouped by era with bios and famous games
- [Openings](https://playchess.tech/openings): Encyclopedia of ECO-coded chess openings with PGN data
- [Pricing](https://playchess.tech/pricing): Subscription plans and billing
- [Blog](https://playchess.tech/blog): Articles on chess strategy, history, and platform updates
- [About](https://playchess.tech/about): About ReplayChess and the team
- [Help](https://playchess.tech/help): FAQ and support
- [Community](https://playchess.tech/community): Community page
- [Contact](https://playchess.tech/contact): Contact form
- [API Docs](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): API documentation
- [Privacy Policy](https://playchess.tech/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://playchess.tech/terms): Terms of service
- [Cookies](https://playchess.tech/cookies): Cookie policy

## API

- [Create Game](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/chess/create-game` — Create a multiplayer game with time controls and optional legend/opening
- [Create AI Game](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/chess/create-ai-game` — Start a game against Stockfish at a chosen difficulty
- [Join Game](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/chess/join` — Join an existing game by reference ID
- [Game State](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/chess/game-state` — Get current board state, clocks, and move history
- [Make Move](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/chess/move` — Submit a move in algebraic notation
- [Game Analysis](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/analysis/[gameId]` — Post-game analysis comparing player moves to the legend's moves
- [Matchmaking](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/matchmaking/create-match-request` — Queue for ELO-based matchmaking
- [Match Status](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/matchmaking/match-status` — Poll for match result
- [Legends List](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/legends` — All chess legends with bios, eras, and famous games
- [Legend Detail](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/legends/[id]` — Individual legend profile and positions
- [Openings List](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/openings` — All ECO-coded openings with PGN data
- [User Profile](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/user/[referenceId]` — User profile, stats, and game history
- [User Sync](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `POST /api/user/sync` — Sync authenticated user from Clerk to database
- [Tournaments](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/tournament` — List and manage tournaments
- [Health Check](https://playchess.tech/docs/api): `GET /api/healthcheck` — Server health status

## Tech Stack

- [Next.js 15](https://nextjs.org/): App Router with SSR and React Server Components
- [React 19](https://react.dev/): With React Compiler enabled for automatic memoization
- [TypeScript 5.9](https://www.typescriptlang.org/): Full type safety across the codebase
- [Tailwind CSS 4](https://tailwindcss.com/): Utility-first styling with dark theme
- [Socket.IO](https://socket.io/): Real-time multiplayer game state synchronization
- [Stockfish WASM](https://github.com/nicfab/stockfish.wasm): Browser-side chess engine for AI games and practice mode
- [chess.js](https://github.com/jhlywa/chess.js): Move validation and board state management
- [Prisma ORM](https://www.prisma.io/): Type-safe database access with PostgreSQL on Neon
- [Clerk](https://clerk.com/): Authentication (email, Google, GitHub sign-in)
- [Zustand](https://zustand-demo.pmnd.rs/): Client-side state management with localStorage persistence
- [Sentry](https://sentry.io/): Error tracking and distributed tracing
- [Motion](https://motion.dev/): Animations and transitions
- [DodoPayments](https://dodopayments.com/): Subscription billing and payments
